name: KefinFrame
author: grimmdev
description: A comprehensive Jellyfin enhancement suite: per-user watchlist, skin/appearance switcher, custom home screen sections, enhanced keyboard search, and custom navigation links. Inspired by KefinTweaks, rebuilt natively for JellyFrame.

vars.name: Accent Color
vars.description: Primary highlight color used in the KefinFrame UI panels.

changelog.notes: Initial release. Features: per-user watchlist (bookmark toggle on all cards), skin/appearance switcher in header, custom home screen sections, enhanced search overlay (/ or Ctrl+K), custom nav links, settings panel with export/import/reset.
